title: Baibars becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Al-Malik al-Zahir Rukn al-Din Baybars al-Bunduqdari, commonly known as Baibars or Baybars (بَيْبَرْس) and nicknamed Abu al-Futuh, was the fourth Mamluk sultan of Egypt and Syria, of Turkic Kipchak origin, in the Bahri dynasty, succeeding Qutuz.

title: Shajar al-Durr becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Shajar al-Durr, also Shajarat al-Durr, whose royal name was al-Malika ʿAṣmat ad-Dīn ʾUmm-Khalīl Shajar ad-Durr, was a ruler of Egypt of Turkic origin.

title: Qutuz becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Sayf ad-Din Qutuz, also romanized as Kutuz or Kotuz and fully al-Malik al-Muẓaffar Sayf ad-Dīn Quṭuz, was the Mamluk Sultan of Egypt.

title: Aybak becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Izz al-Din Aybak was the first of the Mamluk sultans of Egypt in the Turkic Bahri line.

title: Al-Nasir Muhammad becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Al-Malik an-Nasir Nasir ad-Din Muhammad ibn Qalawun, commonly known as an-Nasir Muhammad, or by his kunya: Abu al-Ma'ali or as Ibn Qalawun (1285–1341) was the ninth Mamluk sultan of the Bahri dynasty who ruled Egypt between 1293–1294, 1299–1309, and 1310 until his death in 1341.

title: Qalawun becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Qalāwūn aṣ-Ṣāliḥī was the seventh Turkic Bahri Mamluk sultan of Egypt; he ruled from 1279 to 1290.

title: Al-Ashraf Khalil becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Al-Malik Al-Ashraf Salāh ad-Dīn Khalil ibn Qalawūn was the eighth Turkic Bahri Mamluk sultan, succeeding his father Qalawun.

title: Al-Mansur Ali becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Al-Mansur Ali was the second of the Mamluk Sultans of Egypt in the Turkic, or Bahri, line.

title: Al-Adil Kitbugha becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Kitbugha, royal name: al-Malik al-Adil Zayn-ad-Din Kitbugha Ben Abd-Allah al-Mansuri al-Turki al-Mughli; Arabic: الملك العادل زين الدين كتبغا بن عبد الله المنصورى التركى المغلى) was the 10th Mamluk sultan of Egypt from December 1294 to November 1296.

title: Solamish becomes Mamluk sultan
fact: Badr al-Din Solamish was a Turkic Sultan of Egypt in 1279.
